'''鈭歵h-v-t''' ('''thavata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pomp|pomp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pomp|pomp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-v-t
|-
! Lemma
| thavata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thavatithi|thavatithi]] || [[word:thavatiji|thavatiji]] || [[word:thavatishi|thavatishi]] || [[word:thavati|thavati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thavatuthuth|thavatuthuth]] || [[word:thavatujuj|thavatujuj]] || [[word:thavatushush|thavatushush]] || [[word:thavat|thavat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavatuthu|thavatuthu]] || [[word:thavatuju|thavatuju]] || [[word:thavatushu|thavatushu]] || [[word:thavatu|thavatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavatufuth|thavatufuth]] || [[word:thavatufuj|thavatufuj]] || [[word:thavatufush|thavatufush]] || [[word:thavatuf|thavatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thavatethe|thavatethe]] || [[word:thavateje|thavateje]] || [[word:thavateshe|thavateshe]] || [[word:thavate|thavate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thavatothoth|thavatothoth]] || [[word:thavatojoj|thavatojoj]] || [[word:thavatoshosh|thavatoshosh]] || [[word:thavat|thavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavatotho|thavatotho]] || [[word:thavatojo|thavatojo]] || [[word:thavatosho|thavatosho]] || [[word:thavato|thavato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavatofoth|thavatofoth]] || [[word:thavatofoj|thavatofoj]] || [[word:thavatofosh|thavatofosh]] || [[word:thavatof|thavatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thavat忙th忙|thavat忙th忙]] || [[word:thavat忙j忙|thavat忙j忙]] || [[word:thavat忙sh忙|thavat忙sh忙]] || [[word:thavat忙|thavat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thavatathath|thavatathath]] || [[word:thavatajaj|thavatajaj]] || [[word:thavatashash|thavatashash]] || [[word:thavat|thavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavatatha|thavatatha]] || [[word:thavataja|thavataja]] || [[word:thavatasha|thavatasha]] || [[word:thavata|thavata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavatafath|thavatafath]] || [[word:thavatafaj|thavatafaj]] || [[word:thavatafash|thavatafash]] || [[word:thavataf|thavataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thavatasha|thavatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothavatasha|gothavatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithavatasha|gokithavatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thavatn眉sha|thavatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothavatnkn眉sha|gothavatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithavatn眉sha|gokithavatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thavatsh毛sha|thavatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothavatnksh毛sha|gothavatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithavatsh毛sha|gokithavatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thavatrosha|thavatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothavatnkrosha|gothavatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithavatrosha|gokithavatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thavatmusha|thavatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothavatnkmusha|gothavatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavatmusha|gokithavatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thavatsherasha|thavatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothavatnksherasha|gothavatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithavatsherasha|gokithavatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thavatngasha|thavatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothavatnkngasha|gothavatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithavatngasha|gokithavatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thavatyasha|thavatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothavatnkyasha|gothavatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithavatyasha|gokithavatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thavatyamasha|thavatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothavatnkyamasha|gothavatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithavatyamasha|gokithavatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thavatn眉sh毛sha|thavatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothavatnkn眉sh毛sha|gothavatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithavatn眉sh毛sha|gokithavatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thavatn眉rosha|thavatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothavatnkn眉rosha|gothavatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithavatn眉rosha|gokithavatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavatn眉musha|thavatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothavatnkn眉musha|gothavatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavatn眉musha|gokithavatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thavatsh毛n眉sha|thavatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothavatnksh毛n眉sha|gothavatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithavatsh毛n眉sha|gokithavatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thavatsh毛rosha|thavatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothavatnksh毛rosha|gothavatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithavatsh毛rosha|gokithavatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavatsh毛musha|thavatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothavatnksh毛musha|gothavatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavatsh毛musha|gokithavatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thavatron眉sha|thavatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothavatnkron眉sha|gothavatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithavatron眉sha|gokithavatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thavatrosh毛sha|thavatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothavatnkrosh毛sha|gothavatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithavatrosh毛sha|gokithavatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavatromusha|thavatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothavatnkromusha|gothavatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavatromusha|gokithavatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thavatmun眉sha|thavatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothavatnkmun眉sha|gothavatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithavatmun眉sha|gokithavatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thavatmush毛sha|thavatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothavatnkmush毛sha|gothavatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithavatmush毛sha|gokithavatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thavatmurosha|thavatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothavatnkmurosha|gothavatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithavatmurosha|gokithavatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thavat|thavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙v忙t|th忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothavat|hothavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙v忙t|hoth忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothavat|hohothavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙v忙t|hohoth忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thavat|n眉thavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙v忙t|n眉th忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thavat|n眉n眉thavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙v忙t|n眉n眉th忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thavat|n茂thavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙v忙t|n茂th忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thavat|n茂n茂thavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙v忙t|n茂n茂th忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthavat|luthavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙v忙t|luth忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthavat|luluthavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙v忙t|luluth忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithavat|lithavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙v忙t|lith忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithavat|lilithavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙v忙t|lilith忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothavat|kothavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙v忙t|koth忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothavat|kokothavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙v忙t|kokoth忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethavat|kethavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙v忙t|keth忙v忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethavat|kekethavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙v忙t|keketh忙v忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
